B. An- und Ausziehen von Kompressionsstrümpfen).

Benefits: Hourly rate of €17.92 including 50% Christmas bonus; additional 50% Christmas bonus paid in November; up to €332 holiday pay; immediate permanent full-time contract at 38.5 hours/week; option to cash out overtime; guaranteed pay increases.

Benefits: Varied and dynamic daily work, fair performance-based pay, collaborative team culture, diverse tasks in a creative environment.

Description: Conducts valuables (cash-in-transit) transport runs according to company guidelines, prescribed routes, and customer orders, including goods receipt, storage, and care of delivery vehicles.
Requirements: Passed security competency exam (§34a GewO), weapons proficiency certificate (§7 WaffG), valid Class B driving licence with at least two years' experience, clean police record, reliability clearance (§7 LuftSiG), good German language skills.
Benefits: Permanent contract, qualified induction by experienced team, regular feedback meetings, above-tariff fixed salary, 13th-month pay, additional benefits.

Job_Title: Electrician / Mechatronics Technician – Door and Gate Systems Installer
Description: Installs, inspects, maintains, and repairs industrial door and gate systems, including fault diagnosis and resolution of mechanical and electrical faults and replacement of defective components.
Requirements: Completed vocational qualification as electrician, electronics technician, mechatronics engineer, metalworker, or locksmith; career changers with comparable trades background also welcome; internal qualification programme available.
Benefits: Company vehicle taken home at weekends, new fully equipped vehicle every 3 years, own vehicle and tools per team member, permanent contract in an innovative company, further service benefits not fully specified.

Description: Drives modern heavy trucks transporting containers in regional traffic between terminals, logistics centres, and customers, with fully digital documentation via company smartphone and close coordination with dispatchers.
Requirements: Class CE driving licence and driver card required; experience in container transport and economical operation of articulated lorries is advantageous but not mandatory; knowledge of traffic regulations and driving hours rules; reliability.
Benefits: Attractive pay with holiday pay and additional benefits, latest truck models and professional equipment, option to take truck home, job security and development opportunities.

Description: Transports goods professionally, including loading, unloading, and load securing duties.
Requirements: Class C/CE driving licence with code 95, professional driver qualification and valid driver card, polite manner, anticipatory driving style, reliability, German language skills.
Benefits: Secure job with punctual pay, attractive base salary plus expenses and additional allowances, free work clothing, fixed route with consistent daily destination nearby, modern trucks.

Job_Title: Truck Driver – Breakdown and Recovery Service
Description: Operates tow and recovery trucks to assist with vehicle breakdowns and recover accident-damaged vehicles, including ADAC pick-up runs, communication with breakdown customers and emergency services on-site, and vehicle transfer drives for the sales and service department.
Requirements: Class CE (or former class 2) driving licence with code 95, current clean police certificate, willingness to work shifts, technical understanding, good communication skills, good written and spoken German.
Benefits: Permanent contract, gross earnings exceeding €4,000/month including shift supplements and commission, base salary €3,500 gross for 43-hour week, advance shift schedule provided, rotating shifts.

Description: Drives a truck on a fixed distribution route in the Munich area, performing loading, unloading, load securing, and documentation tasks while keeping the vehicle in good condition.
Requirements: Class C driving licence and driver card required; ADR certificate for general cargo advantageous (pay supplement); teamwork, reliability, punctuality, willingness to work.
Benefits: Punctual pay, dedicated fixed truck, permanent contract, family-friendly working hours, pleasant working environment, Monday to Friday starting at 06:00.

Job_Title: Team Leader for Locomotive Drivers and Shunting Assistants (Construction)
Company_Name: RTS Rail Transport Service Germany GmbH
Description: Leads and mentors an operational team of locomotive drivers and shunting assistants on construction sites, ensuring smooth daily operations, structured onboarding, and compliance with rail safety standards. Acts as the primary escalation point for operational, technical, and personnel matters within the team.
Requirements: Several years of experience as a locomotive driver or shunting assistant; medical and psychological fitness per TfV; German language proficiency at B2 level; class B driving licence; willingness to work shifts including nights, weekends, and public holidays; nationwide travel readiness.
Benefits: Secure employment in a growing sector with attractive pay; BahnCard 100 (2nd class) or alternatively a company vehicle; additional allowance for work on rest days.

Description: Delivers and refills medical oxygen supplies at patients' homes and care facilities, ensuring uninterrupted supply. Provides customer instruction on the correct handling of medical devices while maintaining constant communication with clients, facilities, and field colleagues.
Requirements: Valid class B driving licence or higher; some professional experience preferred; interest in technical and practical topics; strong customer service orientation.
Benefits: Competitive remuneration with a fixed salary, performance bonus, and additional incentives; long-term, secure employment with career prospects.

Job_Title: Exhibition and Signage Fitter for Assembly and Lamination
Description: Carries out independent assembly of advertising and display systems (illuminated signs, lettering, display units) and applies vinyl wrapping to vehicles, furniture, and buildings with high precision. Also operates production equipment such as printers, plotters, and milling machines.
Requirements: Willingness to learn and creativity in advertising technology; cross-sector career changers welcome; precision and attention to detail; flexibility across varied projects; driving licence advantageous.
Benefits: Varied and responsible role in a family-oriented environment; opportunity to apply craftsmanship and creativity across diverse projects; modern workplace across two locations (Munich and Kirchseeon).

Job_Title: Electrician for Energy and Building Technology
Description: Installs, commissions, and maintains photovoltaic systems and battery storage units, including wiring and testing of metering, switching, and distribution panels. Depending on experience level, may also independently lead and coordinate projects on site.
Requirements: Completed vocational training as an electrician for energy and building technology or equivalent; master electrician qualification welcome; experience with PV or storage projects desirable; structured, solution-oriented working style.
Benefits: Future-oriented role in a growing renewable energy company; full responsibility for PV, storage, and charging infrastructure projects; opportunity to lead teams and advance to technical operations manager; work with state-of-the-art technology.

Company_Name: RTS Rail Transport Service Germany GmbH
Description: Operates locomotives for freight and shunting services nationwide, including on construction sites, ensuring safe and reliable delivery of goods. Independently prepares train and shunting runs, performs control and closing duties, and applies technical expertise throughout operations.
Requirements: Completed training as a locomotive driver class B2; medical and psychological fitness certificate; German language proficiency at B2 level; willingness to travel nationwide; readiness for shift work including nights, weekends, and public holidays; class B driving licence.
Benefits: Additional allowance for work on rest days; targeted support for professional and personal development through individual training and further education; corporate benefits programme.

Description: Delivers parcel shipments to customers using company vehicles, including fully electric vans, with average parcel weights under 10 kg. Responsible for reliable and efficient last-mile delivery on assigned routes.
Requirements: Valid car driving licence (class B); basic conversational German; physically fit and weather-resistant; reliable and committed.
Benefits: Permanent employment contract; tariff hourly wage of €17.92 (including 50% Christmas bonus) plus €1.63 regional supplement; additional 50% Christmas bonus in November; up to €332 holiday pay; immediate full-time start at 38.5 hours per week; job security with guaranteed salary.

Description: Transports the on-call physician of the KVB out-of-hours medical service to home visit appointments, while maintaining and caring for the assigned vehicle and equipment. Accurately documents all journeys and deployments.
Requirements: Ideally a completed qualification as a paramedic or emergency medical assistant; minimum qualification as a first-aid assistant or willingness to obtain it (56 teaching units); valid class B driving licence issued within the EU/EEA; passenger transport licence (Personenbeförderungsschein) or willingness to obtain it.
Benefits: Shift work including Sundays and public holidays (on-call standby); suitable for career changers or returners; support provided for re-entry after extended career breaks.

Description: Transports vehicles safely and efficiently to customer locations, taking responsibility for load securing and correct coupling and uncoupling of trailers. Part-time role with approximately 4–6 hours per week.
Requirements: Class BE driving licence; experience driving with trailers; reliability and punctuality; willingness to work flexible hours.
Benefits: Friendly, young, and motivated team; independent and varied work.

Description: Operates railway vehicles safely in accordance with applicable regulations and duty schedules, carrying out shunting operations, vehicle coupling, wagon inspections, and route knowledge maintenance. Engages in ongoing training including simulation exercises and supervisory runs to maintain required qualifications.
Requirements: Completed training as a railway operational service worker or equivalent locomotive driver qualification; valid locomotive driver's licence and confirmed railway medical fitness; existing Austrian border or full authorisation, or willingness to obtain required qualifications; shift work readiness.
Benefits: Permanent contract with attractive remuneration; occupational pension and capital-forming benefits; Christmas and holiday pay with up to 30 days annual leave depending on length of service; participation in rest-day scheduling; paid guest journeys and travel time; BahnCard.

Description: Picks, packs, inspects, and stores rental furniture in the warehouse according to pick lists, and delivers furniture to trade fairs and events using company vehicles (van or lorry depending on licence held). Also responsible for cleaning, maintaining, and carrying out inventory of the furniture stock.
Requirements: Ideally prior warehouse or picking experience; forklift licence advantageous but not mandatory; teamwork ability, reliability, resilience, and initiative; willingness to work overtime and weekends; very good German language skills; valid German work permit; minimum class B driving licence (lorry licence an advantage).
Benefits: Permanent full-time position; long-term stable employment; varied and interesting work; performance-related salary with free parking and work clothing provided; supplements for overtime and Sunday work; family-oriented work environment with flat hierarchies.
